Bash(sqlite3 gijoe_collection.db "select accessory_id, count\(*\) as n_figs, sum\(is_original\) as n_original from figure_accessories group by accessory_id having n_figs>1 order by n_figs desc limit 10;")

Bash(sqlite3 gijoe_collection.db "select a.id, a.name, a.category_id, ac.name from accessories a join accessory_categories ac on ac.category_id=a.category_id where a.id=34;")
